title: India Learner's Licence Application
description: Apply for a new Learner's Licence (LL) from an Indian Regional Transport Office (RTO), the mandatory first step before sitting a driving test and being issued a full Driving Licence (DL) for any motor vehicle class. Nationally, both the LL and the DL (and renewal, addition of class, duplicate, and address/name-change requests) are made on the same Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989 'Form 2', submitted through each state's instance of the Sarathi online portal (sarathi.parivahan.gov.in) or in person at the licensing RTO. This document models only the 'Issue of New Learner's Licence' service on Form 2 — the fields and declarations common to a first-time LL applicant of any age or vehicle class. It does not model: Issue of New Driving Licence, Addition of Class of Vehicle, Renewal of Driving Licence, Duplicate Driving Licence, Change/Correction of Address, or Change/Correction of Name (the form's other six selectable services, which layer additional fields such as existing-licence particulars and driving-school/test results onto the same base form); the driving test itself; or vehicle registration (a separate process on Form 20 via the VAHAN portal, out of scope of this document). It does not submit the application; the live Sarathi portal and the applicant's RTO are always authoritative — see VERIFICATION.md.

authority.name: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways, Government of India, through the state Regional Transport Offices (RTOs), under the Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989

source.documentRef: Form 2 [Refer Rules 10, 14, 17 and 18] — Application for Learner's Licence or Driving Licence or Addition of a New Class of Vehicle or Renewal of Driving Licence or Change of Address or Name, Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored directly from the current Form 2 PDF hosted on parivahan.gov.in (fetched directly, HTTP 200; a Meghalaya RTO mirror of the same form was found to be a stale pre-amendment version using obsolete vehicle-category labels and was not used). The fee schedule was corroborated from parivahan.gov.in's own 'Licensing Related Fees & Charges' page (Rule 32: Rs. 150 per class for issue of a learner's licence). The transactional Sarathi wizard itself (sarathi.parivahan.gov.in) returned an Access-Denied WAF response to direct fetch and was not used as a source; the form-field extraction is from the canonical PDF only. Status remains 'draft' pending a live-portal, state-instance field-by-field pass.

fields.name: applyingForNewLearnersLicenceOnly
fields.label: Are you applying for the issue of a new Learner's Licence?
fields.description: Form 2's 'Services applying for' block lets an applicant tick any of 7 services (new LL, new DL, addition of class, renewal, duplicate, change of address, change of name). This document models only the new-Learner's-Licence pathway; the other six require different existing-licence, driving-test, or evidentiary fields not modelled here.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — 'Services applying for': Issue of New Learner's Licence (and 6 other checkbox options)

fields.name: classOfVehicleApplied
fields.label: Class of vehicle applied for
fields.description: The national vehicle-category codes used on Form 2. A minor applicant (age 16 up to 18) may lawfully be issued a Learner's Licence only for Motor Cycle Without Gear (MCWOG); every other class requires the applicant to be an adult. This document models a single selected class per application, the common case; an applicant seeking more than one class submits a separate declared class per application.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2, Class(es) of Vehicle (COV) checkbox group and footnote definitions

fields.name: aadhaarNumber
fields.label: Aadhaar number (if already available)
fields.description: 12-digit Aadhaar number issued by the Unique Identification Authority of India (UIDAI).
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Aadhaar Card Number (if already available)

fields.name: aadhaarApplicationNumber
fields.label: Aadhaar enrolment/application number (if applied for but not yet issued)
fields.description: Only applicable if Aadhaar has been applied for but the Aadhaar number has not yet been issued.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Aadhaar Card application number (if applied for)

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: In capital letters, as it should appear on the licence.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Name of Applicant: First Name

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Name of Applicant: Middle Name

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Name of Applicant: Last Name

fields.name: relationType
fields.label: Son/Wife/Daughter of — relation
fields.description: Which relation the following name field names.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — 'Son/Wife/Daughter of' (tick Father/Mother/Husband/Guardian)

fields.name: relatedPersonName
fields.label: Father's/Mother's/Husband's/Guardian's name
fields.description: Full name of the person identified by relationType.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — 'Son/Wife/Daughter of' — First/Middle/Last Name

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: dd/mm/yyyy on the source form; represented here as YYYY-MM-DD.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Date of Birth

fields.name: applicantIsMinor
fields.label: Is the applicant under 18 years of age?
fields.description: A minor applicant (16 up to 18) requires a parent/legal-guardian consent declaration under section 7(2) of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988, and may only be issued a Learner's Licence for MCWOG.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Declaration of Parent/Guardian, 'in case of applicant who is a minor'; Motor Vehicles Act 1988, s.7(2)

fields.name: parentGuardianName
fields.label: Consenting parent or guardian's name
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Parent/Guardian Declaration (s.7(2), Motor Vehicles Act 1988)

fields.name: parentGuardianRelationship
fields.label: Consenting parent or guardian's relationship to applicant
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Parent/Guardian Declaration

fields.name: gender
fields.label: Gender
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Sex/Gender (tick Male/Female/Transgender)

fields.name: identificationMark
fields.label: Identification mark
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Identification Mark

fields.name: educationalQualification
fields.label: Educational qualification
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Educational Qualification

fields.name: bloodGroup
fields.label: Blood group
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Blood Group

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Email (optional)

fields.name: mobileNumber
fields.label: Mobile number
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Mobile number

fields.name: landlineNumber
fields.label: Landline number
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Landline Number (optional)

fields.name: presentAddressLine1
fields.label: Present address — House/Door/Flat No., Street/Locality
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Present Address: House/Door/Flat No., Street/Locality/Police Station

fields.name: presentAddressVillageOrTown
fields.label: Present address — Village/Town
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Present Address: Village/Town

fields.name: presentAddressDistrict
fields.label: Present address — District
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Present Address: District

fields.name: presentAddressState
fields.label: Present address — State/Union Territory
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Present Address: State

fields.name: presentAddressPinCode
fields.label: Present address — PIN code
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Present Address: Pin code

fields.name: permanentAddressSameAsPresent
fields.label: Is your permanent address the same as your present address?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Permanent Address (only if different from present address)

fields.name: permanentAddressLine1
fields.label: Permanent address — House/Door/Flat No., Street/Locality
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Permanent Address (only if different from Present Address)

fields.name: hasEpilepsyOrLossOfConsciousness
fields.label: Do you have epilepsy, or have you ever had a sudden loss of consciousness or giddiness?
fields.description: Part of the Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness (corresponds to Form 1).
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness, question (a)

fields.name: canReadRegistrationMarkAt25m
fields.label: Can you read a vehicle registration mark from a distance of 25 metres (with glasses/contact lenses if you wear them)?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness, question (b): visual acuity test

fields.name: wearsGlassesOrContactLenses
fields.label: Do you wear glasses or contact lenses?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness, question (b)

fields.name: hasLossOfLimbOrMuscularDefect
fields.label: Have you lost a hand or foot, or do you have a muscular power defect in an arm or leg?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness, question (c)

fields.name: hasNightBlindness
fields.label: Do you have night blindness?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness, question (d)

fields.name: canHearOrdinarySoundSignal
fields.label: Can you hear an ordinary sound signal (with a hearing aid if you use one)?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness, question (e)

fields.name: usesHearingAid
fields.label: Do you use a hearing aid?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness, question (e)

fields.name: hasOtherDiseaseOrDisabilityDangerousToPublic
fields.label: Do you have any other disease or disability that is likely to cause danger to the public?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Self-Declaration as to Physical Fitness, question (f)

fields.name: previouslyDisqualifiedFromLicence
fields.label: Have you ever been disqualified from holding a driving licence?
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — General declaration: 'I have/have not been disqualified from holding a Driving Licence'

fields.name: willingToDonateOrgans
fields.label: Are you willing to donate your organs/tissue in the event of death?
fields.description: A voluntary declaration recorded on the licence, per the Motor Vehicles (Amendment) Act, 2019 organ-donation pledge option; answering 'no' does not affect eligibility.
fields.sourceRef: Form 2 — Organ donation declaration

documents.label: Proof of address and age
documents.sourceRef: Form 2, Annexure — List of Documents to be Submitted/Uploaded: Proof of Address AND Age

documents.label: Parent or guardian consent declaration
documents.statement: Signed declaration by the applicant's parent or legal guardian consenting to the minor applicant holding a Learner's Licence, per section 7(2) of the Motor Vehicles Act, 1988.
documents.sourceRef: Form 2, Annexure — 'Parent or Guardian Declaration — in case applicant is a minor'

documents.label: Medical Certificate (Form 1A)
documents.issuingAuthority: Registered medical practitioner not below the rank of Civil Surgeon
documents.sourceRef: Form 2, Annexure — Medical Certificate (Form-1A), required when 'applying for renewal and is above 40 years of age, or applying for a Transport Licence'

documents.label: Passport-size photograph
documents.sourceRef: Form 2 — passport-size photograph upload, 'size not more than 50 KB'

documents.label: Learner's licence application fee payment
documents.sourceRef: Central Motor Vehicles Rules, 1989, Rule 32 fee schedule, per parivahan.gov.in 'Licensing Related Fees & Charges': Rs. 150 per class of vehicle for issue of a learner's licence, plus a Rs. 50 test fee where a computerised LL test applies; amount not encoded as a fixed field value since fees are set by rule and can change over time, consistent with in/mea/passport-application-first-adult and other GovSchema documents' fee convention.

steps.title: Self-declaration as to physical fitness and other declarations
